name: Netscan
summary: Scan local networks and list discovered devices.
description: Netscan is an if-uri urirun connector for scan local networks and list discovered devices. It is represented in the public catalog so the connector can be discovered, versioned and linked to its repository while implementation details are completed.
useCases: Discover Netscan capabilities from the connector catalog.
Plan flows that use netscan:// URI routes.
Install or track the connector from its GitHub repository.
